author: zlipeng
abstract: End-to-end workflow skill: generate a multi-phase plan, save it under plans/, execute each Phase with strict branch + commit gates, run an independent review pass between phases (using the bundled reviewer prompt), and append a Test Cases section once all phases pass. The review pass is described as a runtime-agnostic capability with adapters for Claude Code, Codex CLI, and generic agents — no specific subagent or tool is required. Plan documents follow a language-priority rule: explicit user request > conversation language > English fallback.
